name: teammate-idle-enforcement
summary: Kill or warn about teammate agents that have been idle > N minutes. Prevents token-wasting zombie processes.
when_to_use: Projects using agent teams. Tunes the idle threshold via TEAMMATE_IDLE_MINUTES env var (default 15).
script:
#!/usr/bin/env bash
set -euo pipefail
THRESHOLD_MIN="${TEAMMATE_IDLE_MINUTES:-15}"
STATE=.claude/teammates.jsonl
[ ! -f "$STATE" ] && { echo '{"decision":"approve"}'; exit 0; }
NOW=$(date -u +%s)
IDLE_CUTOFF=$((NOW - THRESHOLD_MIN * 60))
WARN=0
while IFS= read -r LINE; do
  LAST=$(jq -r '.last_active_ts // 0' <<<"$LINE" 2>/dev/null || echo 0)
  NAME=$(jq -r '.name // "?"' <<<"$LINE" 2>/dev/null || echo '?')
  if [ "$LAST" -lt "$IDLE_CUTOFF" ] && [ "$LAST" -gt 0 ]; then
    printf 'Idle teammate: %s (last active: %s)\n' "$NAME" "$(date -r $LAST 2>/dev/null || echo ?)" >&2
    WARN=$((WARN+1))
  fi
done < "$STATE"
[ "$WARN" -gt 0 ] && printf 'Consider cleanup via team-orchestrator.\n' >&2
echo '{"decision":"approve"}'
verify: Populate .claude/teammates.jsonl with a stale entry; confirm warning in stderr on Stop.
